raw_consumer_statement:
Last year I ordered some items for my home from XXXX XXXX. A few of the items in the order were incorrectly sent so XXXX XXXX set up a return for them. Unfortunately, XXXX XXXX didn't refund in full. I have tried endlessly to get them to help but it has been very difficult so i contacted Citi Bank for help and gave them all of the information. The information I provided proves that I returned everything, UPS tracking, weight matches and all of the correspondence with XXXX XXXX. 
Citi did not handle this dispute correctly and due to that, time ran out, and I was not refunded in full. It has recently come to my attention that Citi disputes are not done by Humans and I feel this could be a main reason they were missed. I called in multiple times too but never got anywhere. I am attaching all of the information. At this point, due to so much time gone by, I am asking for Citi to cover the lost money and put that back into my account. 
Thank you for your help in this matter. 
I wish I didn't have to file these complaints but I have literally stressed myself out trying to get Citi to help as they should. 
I am a XXXX person and while this might not be a lot of money to some, it definitely is to me I also am not able to shop in store at XXXX XXXX and have to rely on mail order.
